taxonomy: Pistolochia firouzii is classified as a species within the family Celastraceae, which is a family of flowering plants. This family is further categorized as part of the order Celastrales, in the class Magnoliopsida. The classification of Pistolochia firouzii also places it within the subclass Rosidae. Pistolochia firouzii is a monotypic genus, meaning it only contains one species. Its classification is a part of the broader system of plant taxonomy.

The health benefits of Pistolochia firouzii include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, improve digestion, and exhibit antimicrobial properties.
